mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals resilient household demand and near-term revenue support for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when measured using RSAFS growth.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value was available for 2019-08-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce positive 20-day return Rank IC above 0.03 over a 3-year rolling walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment above a short-run threshold signals labor-market deterioration and falling earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value was 3.7 for 2019-08-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if mean triggered returns are not below unconditional mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate signals easier discount-rate conditions that raise the present value of future earnings, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS falls by at least 0.25 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value was 2.13 for 2019-08-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward returns after FEDFUNDS declines are not higher than returns after FEDFUNDS increases, or if the sign of the coefficient is negative in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation is rising while the federal funds rate is rising, equity valuations face simultaneous margin and discount-rate pressure, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month growth accelerates and FEDFUNDS rises over the same 6-month window
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with inflation pressure
failure_condition: Reject if the joint rising-CPIAUCSL and rising-FEDFUNDS state has average 20-day returns at or above the unconditional average in two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production signals weakening real activity and lower cyclical earnings, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value was available for 2019-07-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if negative 3-month INDPRO growth is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 65% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: An upswing in housing starts signals improving interest-sensitive demand and future construction-related income, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value was available for 2019-07-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST upswings do not produce average 60-day returns above the unconditional 60-day average after transaction-date alignment.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating payroll employment signals rising aggregate income and lower recession risk, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days through rapid risk-premium compression.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average monthly change crosses above its prior 12-month average monthly change
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value was 151541 for 2019-08-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if PAYEMS acceleration has non-positive average 5-day forward returns or if the hit rate is below 50% in walk-forward triggered samples.

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment is low and retail sales momentum is positive, the economy is in a late-cycle consumption expansion that supports earnings before recession risk dominates, producing positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is below 4% and RSAFS 3-month percent change is above 0
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value was 3.7 and RSAFS vintage value was 526057 for 2019-08-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-UNRATE and positive-RSAFS state fails to outperform periods with low UNRATE and negative RSAFS momentum over 20-day forward returns.
